title: Pin the config-declared markdown source path with an isolated integration test
description:
A project-scoped, markdown-first item kind is already indexable purely from `[item_kinds]` config naming an arbitrary `.md` source (`project_items` -> `storage.read_repo_file` -> `index_project_sources`, commands/item.rs:213-242). This task proves that contract so a future change cannot silently re-narrow it.

Scope: add a dedicated integration test that, in an ISOLATED temp repo, writes an `[item_kinds]` table declaring a markdown kind over an arbitrary `.md` file and asserts that kind's items index with their qualified ids. Do NOT modify this repo's real `.jit/config.toml`; this task is limited to an isolated integration test and leaves this repo's real config unchanged. No production Rust change.

## Success Criteria
- [hard] REQ-01: A config-declared markdown kind naming an arbitrary `.md` source indexes its items with no Rust change and without modifying this repo's real `.jit/config.toml`, verified by an integration test that builds the config and source in an isolated repo.
